name: Coda
description: Drive Coda (docs + tables + formulas) from any AI agent: docs, tables, rows, columns, formulas, packs, controls. 13 tools, Bearer token auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the Coda API v1 (coda.io/developers/apis/v1).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to https://coda.io → top-right avatar → **Account → API settings → Generate API token**.
2. Name the token. Copy it. Set `CODA_API_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${CODA_API_TOKEN}`.

**Resource hierarchy**: Doc → Section (Page) → Table → Row → Cell. Coda's twist: tables are first-class with structured columns and types; rows are addressable individually; columns can hold formulas.

**Doc IDs** look like `dXXXXXXXXXX` (10-char prefix `d`). Visible in the doc URL.

**Table IDs** look like `grid-XXXXX`. Discover via `coda_list_tables(docId)`.

**Column IDs** look like `c-XXXX`. Discover via `coda_list_columns(docId, tableId)`. When upserting rows you reference cells by column ID OR column name.

**Row IDs** look like `i-XXXX`. Available after a row is created.

**Upserting rows (with key columns)**: pass `keyColumns` (array of column IDs/names) to `coda_upsert_rows` — Coda matches existing rows by those columns and updates them, otherwise inserts. Without `keyColumns`, it always inserts.

**Cell value formats**:
  - Text/Number/Boolean: pass the raw value.
  - Date/DateTime: ISO 8601 string.
  - Person: pass an object `{email}`.
  - Lookup/Relation: pass the row ID of the related row OR the display value.
  - Image/Attachment: pass a public HTTPS URL.

**Sync vs disableParsing**: by default Coda parses cell values (interprets formulas, types). Set `disableParsing=true` if you want raw string passthrough.

**Pagination**: cursor via `pageToken` (returned in response's `nextPageToken`). `limit` default 25, max 200.

**Rate limits**: 100 req/min per token. On 429 back off.

**Out of scope here**: doc creation/publishing, control updates beyond list, pack version management, automations, formula evaluation arbitrary, sections beyond list.

tools.name: coda_whoami
tools.description: Return the user the token belongs to. Returns name, loginId (email), pictureLink, type, tokenName, workspace.

tools.name: coda_list_docs
tools.description: List docs the user can access. Filter by owner, query, workspace. Pagination via pageToken.

sourceDoc.description: Filter to copies of this doc ID.

tools.name: coda_get_doc
tools.description: Fetch a single doc by ID. Returns metadata: name, owner, ownerName, browserLink, icon, workspace.

tools.name: coda_list_tables
tools.description: List tables in a doc. Each table has id (e.g. 'grid-XXXXX'), name, tableType (table/view), rowCount, displayColumn, sorts, layout.

tools.name: coda_list_columns
tools.description: List columns in a table. Each column has id (e.g. 'c-XXXX'), name, display (true if it's the display column), calculated, formula, format (type info).

tools.name: coda_list_rows
tools.description: List rows in a table or view. Supports filtering by a query like 'Status="Active"' (uses Coda formula syntax with column IDs or names).

useColumnNames.description: If true, returned cells are keyed by column name. Default false (keyed by ID).

tools.name: coda_get_row
tools.description: Fetch a single row by ID. Returns cells keyed by column ID (or name if useColumnNames=true).

useColumnNames.description: Key cells by name vs ID.

tools.name: coda_insert_rows
tools.description: Insert (or upsert with keyColumns) rows into a table. Returns a requestId for tracking the async ingest job.

rows.description: Array of row objects: [{cells: [{column: 'c-XXXX' or column-name, value: ...}, ...]}, ...]. value can be string/number/boolean OR object for person ({email}) / row link (rowId string).

keyColumns.description: Array of column IDs/names to match for upsert. Omit for pure insert.

disableParsing.description: If true, send raw values without Coda parsing.

tools.name: coda_update_row
tools.description: Update a specific row by ID. Returns a requestId for tracking async update.

tools.name: coda_delete_row
tools.description: Delete a single row by ID.

tools.name: coda_delete_rows
tools.description: Bulk-delete rows by IDs (more efficient than per-row).

rowIds.description: Array of row IDs to delete.

tools.name: coda_get_formula_result
tools.description: Evaluate a named formula on a doc. Returns the current value of a formula by name (defined in the doc via Add Formula).

tools.name: coda_get_mutation_status
tools.description: Check the status of an async mutation (insert/update/delete) by its requestId returned from those calls. Returns completed boolean.

requestId.description: RequestId from a prior mutation call.
